rules.name: High-Frequency Burst
rules.action: Increase risk_score by 25; set anomaly_type to short_time_high_freq; alert review
rules.analyst_display: Show as amber badge in Velocity column; tooltip lists hourly txn count

rules.name: New Device High Value
rules.action: Set anomaly_type to new_device; increase risk_score to min(score+30, 100); alert review
rules.analyst_display: Highlight device_id cell; link to device onboarding audit log

rules.name: Location Mismatch
rules.action: Set anomaly_type to location_mismatch; increase risk_score by 20; flag for geo review
rules.analyst_display: Red pin icon on Location column; show usual vs current city in expander

rules.name: Amount Peak Outlier
rules.action: Set anomaly_type to amount_peak; increase risk_score by 15; queue enhanced due diligence
rules.analyst_display: Bold amount with ↑ indicator; sidebar shows baseline comparison

rules.name: Compound Risk Escalation
rules.action: Force risk_score >= 80; merge explanations; immediate alert to auditor role
rules.analyst_display: Full-row red tint; pinned to top of analyst queue with COMPOUND tag

analyst_ui_notes.layout: Rules panel as collapsible card above transaction table (read-only for analyst)
analyst_ui_notes.interaction: Hover rule row to highlight matching transactions in table
